# tackeons CSS

> A streamlined fork of Tachyons CSS. Functional CSS for humans, modernized.

tackeons is a functional/atomic CSS framework providing single-purpose utility classes. Compose classes directly in HTML instead of writing CSS. Container-query responsive, dark/light scheme aware, with glass, gradient, and filter effects.

## Project Structure

```
/css/                 # Compiled CSS output
  tackeons.css        # Full compiled CSS
  tackeons.min.css    # Minified production CSS
  tachyons.css        # Deprecated shim (do not use in new projects)

/src/                 # Source CSS modules (PostCSS)
  tackeons.css        # Main entry point importing all modules
  _*.css              # Individual module files (prefixed with underscore)
```

## Core Principles

- Everything should be 100% responsive
- Single-purpose class structure (one class = one CSS property)
- Mobile-first, container-query based architecture
- 8px baseline grid for spacing
- Design in the browser
- Changes to one interface shouldn't break others

## Quick Start

```
npm install tackeons
```

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="node_modules/tackeons/css/tackeons.min.css">
```

## Naming Conventions

### Base + Modifier Pattern
Classes follow `{property}{value}` or `{property}{direction}{value}`

Examples:
- `pa3` = padding-all: 1rem
- `mt2` = margin-top: 0.5rem
- `f4` = font-size: 1.25rem
- `w-50` = width: 50%

### Container Query Suffixes
tackeons uses container queries instead of `@media`. The `html` element defaults to `container-type: inline-size`, so responsive suffixes work anywhere on the page. Opt-out subtrees with `.container-normal`.

| Suffix | Container width | Description |
|--------|----------------|-------------|
| (none) | All | Mobile-first base styles |
| `-s`   | ≥30em (480px) | Small container and up |
| `-m`   | ≥48em (768px) | Medium container and up |
| `-l`   | ≥64em (1024px) | Large container and up |

Example: `dn db-s` = display:none on narrow containers, display:block on ≥30em

## Dark / Light Scheme

Semantic color variables with automatic dark-scheme overrides:

```css
/* Light (default) */
--color-primary: blue;
--color-bg: white;
--color-text: near-black;

/* Dark (auto-applied via prefers-color-scheme) */
--color-primary: light-blue;
--color-bg: near-black;
--color-text: near-white;
```

Classes use these variables, so `bg-primary` / `primary` / `b--primary` adapt automatically to the user's OS color scheme.

## Spacing Scale

Powers of two (8px baseline):

| Step | Value | CSS Variable |
|------|-------|--------------|
| 0 | 0 | --spacing-none |
| 1 | 0.25rem (4px) | --spacing-extra-small |
| 2 | 0.5rem (8px) | --spacing-small |
| 3 | 1rem (16px) | --spacing-medium |
| 4 | 2rem (32px) | --spacing-large |
| 5 | 4rem (64px) | --spacing-extra-large |
| 6 | 8rem (128px) | --spacing-extra-extra-large |
| 7 | 16rem (256px) | --spacing-extra-extra-extra-large |

### Spacing Classes
- **Padding**: `pa`, `pl`, `pr`, `pt`, `pb`, `pv` (vertical), `ph` (horizontal)
- **Margin**: `ma`, `ml`, `mr`, `mt`, `mb`, `mv` (vertical), `mh` (horizontal)

Examples: `pa3`, `mt4`, `ph2-s`, `mb0-l`

## Type Scale

| Class | Size |
|-------|------|
| `.f-headline`, `.f-6` | 6rem |
| `.f-subheadline`, `.f-5` | 5rem |
| `.f1` | 3rem |
| `.f2` | 2.25rem |
| `.f3` | 1.5rem |
| `.f4` | 1.25rem |
| `.f5` | 1rem |
| `.f6` | 0.875rem |
| `.f7` | 0.75rem |

## Width Scale

### Fixed Widths (powers of 2)
`.w1` (1rem), `.w2` (2rem), `.w3` (4rem), `.w4` (8rem), `.w5` (16rem)

### Percentage Widths
`.w-10` through `.w-90` in 10% steps, plus `.w-25`, `.w-33`, `.w-34`, `.w-50`, `.w-60`, `.w-70`, `.w-75`, `.w-80`, `.w-90`, `.w-100`
Aliases: `.w-third`, `.w-two-thirds`, `.w-auto`

## Color System

### Grayscale (both spellings supported)
`black`, `near-black`, `dark-gray` / `dark-grey`, `mid-gray` / `mid-grey`, `gray` / `grey`, `silver`, `light-silver`, `moon-gray` / `moon-grey`, `light-gray` / `light-grey`, `near-white`, `white`

### Transparency
- Black: `black-90` through `black-05` (90% to 5% opacity)
- White: `white-90` through `white-10`

### Colors
`dark-red`, `red`, `light-red`, `orange`, `gold`, `yellow`, `light-yellow`, `purple`, `light-purple`, `dark-pink`, `hot-pink`, `pink`, `light-pink`, `dark-green`, `green`, `light-green`, `navy`, `dark-blue`, `blue`, `light-blue`, `lightest-blue`, `washed-blue`, `washed-green`, `washed-yellow`, `washed-red`

### Color Classes
- **Text color**: Use color name directly (e.g., `blue`, `dark-gray`)
- **Background**: Prefix with `bg-` (e.g., `bg-blue`, `bg-dark-gray`)
- **Border**: Prefix with `b--` (e.g., `b--blue`, `b--dark-gray`)

### Grey/Gray Border Colors
Numbered border-color classes: `.b--grey-0` through `.b--grey-9`, `.b--gray-0` through `.b--gray-9`

## Glass & Effects

### Glass Morphism
`glass1` through `glass10` — frosted-glass panels with configurable background opacity and blur. Includes hover (`glass1-hover` through `glass10-hover`) and focus (`glass1-focus` through `glass10-focus`) variants.

Customize via CSS variables:
```css
--glass-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
--glass-blur: 20px;
```

### Gradients
Background gradient utilities: `.gradient-1` through `.gradient-4`. Override the angle:
```css
--gradient-degree: 135deg;
```

### Filters
CSS filter effects: `.blur-1` through `.blur-5`, `.brightness-1` through `.brightness-5`, `.contrast-1` through `.contrast-5`

### Backdrop Filters
Apply filters behind elements: `.backdrop-blur-1` through `.backdrop-blur-5`, `.backdrop-brightness-1` through `.backdrop-brightness-5`

## Grid System

CSS Grid utilities alongside the traditional float/flexbox systems:

- **Grid container**: `.grid`
- **Grid columns**: `.grid-column-1` through `.grid-column-12`, `.grid-column-auto`
- **Grid rows**: `.grid-row-1` through `.grid-row-6`, `.grid-row-auto`
- **Template columns**: `.grid-cols-1` through `.grid-cols-6`
- **Gap**: `.gap-0` through `.gap-7` (all sides)
- **Column gap**: `.gap-column-0` through `.gap-column-7`
- **Row gap**: `.gap-row-0` through `.gap-row-7`

All grid classes support container query suffixes: `.grid-column-6-s`, `.gap-3-l`, etc.

## Common Class Categories

### Display
`dn` (none), `di` (inline), `db` (block), `dib` (inline-block), `dt` (table), `dtc` (table-cell), `flex`, `inline-flex`, `grid`, `inline-grid`

### Flexbox
- Container: `flex`, `inline-flex`, `flex-column`, `flex-row`, `flex-wrap`, `flex-nowrap`
- Direction: `flex-row`, `flex-row-reverse`, `flex-column`, `flex-column-reverse`
- Wrap: `flex-wrap`, `flex-nowrap`, `flex-wrap-reverse`
- Alignment: `items-center`, `items-start`, `items-end`, `items-baseline`, `items-stretch`
- Justify: `justify-center`, `justify-start`, `justify-end`, `justify-between`, `justify-around`, `justify-evenly`
- Self: `self-center`, `self-start`, `self-end`, `self-stretch`, `self-auto`
- Flex: `flex-auto`, `flex-none`, `flex-grow-0`, `flex-grow-1`, `flex-shrink-0`, `flex-shrink-1`
- Order: `order-0` through `order-8`, `order-first`, `order-last`

### Position
`static`, `relative`, `absolute`, `fixed`, `sticky`

### Coordinates
`top-0`, `right-0`, `bottom-0`, `left-0`, `top-1`, `top-2`, etc. Includes auto: `top-auto`, `right-auto`, etc.

### Border Radius
`br0`, `br1`, `br2`, `br3`, `br4`, `br-100` (circle), `br-pill` (rounded pill)
Directional: `br--top`, `br--bottom`, `br--left`, `br--right`

### Borders
- Width: `bw0`, `bw1`, `bw2`, `bw3`, `bw4`, `bw5`
- Style: `b--solid`, `b--dashed`, `b--dotted`, `b--none`
- Sides: `ba` (all), `bt` (top), `br` (right), `bb` (bottom), `bl` (left), `bn` (none)

### Typography
- Weight: `fw1` (100) through `fw9` (900), `normal`, `b` (bold)
- Style: `i` (italic), `fs-normal`
- Alignment: `tl` (left), `tr` (right), `tc` (center), `tj` (justify)
- Transform: `ttc` (capitalize), `ttl` (lowercase), `ttu` (uppercase), `ttn` (none)
- Decoration: `no-underline`, `underline`, `strike`
- Line height: `lh-solid` (1), `lh-title` (1.25), `lh-copy` (1.5)
- Letter spacing: `tracked`, `tracked-tight`, `tracked-mega`

### Opacity
`.o-0` through `.o-100` in 5% steps, plus `.o-10` through `.o-90` in 10% steps

### Visibility
`v-hidden`, `v-visible`, `clip` (visually hidden but accessible)

### Overflow
`overflow-visible`, `overflow-hidden`, `overflow-scroll`, `overflow-auto`
Axis-specific: `overflow-x-visible`, `overflow-y-hidden`, etc.

### Heights
Fixed: `h1`, `h2`, `h3`, `h4`, `h5` (1rem to 16rem)
Percentage: `h-25`, `h-50`, `h-75`, `h-100`
Viewport: `vh-25`, `vh-50`, `vh-75`, `vh-100`, `min-vh-100`

### Max Width
`mw1` through `mw9`, `mw-100`, `mw-none`

### Z-Index
`z-0`, `z-1`, `z-2`, `z-3`, `z-4`, `z-5`, `z-999`, `z-9999`, `z-max`, `z-inherit`, `z-initial`, `z-unset`

### Floats & Clears
`fl` (left), `fr` (right), `fn` (none), `cf` (clearfix)

### Lists
`list` (removes default list styling)

### Box Sizing
`border-box` (applied globally via `*`)

### Container Type
`container-size`, `container-inline`, `container-normal`, `.root` — set up nested container query contexts

### Rotations
`.rotate-45`, `.rotate-90`, `.rotate-135`, `.rotate-180`, `.rotate-225`, `.rotate-270`, `.rotate-315`

### Text Shadow
`.text-shadow-1` through `.text-shadow-5`

### Hovers & Focus
Prefix with `hover-` or `focus-` for state variants: `hover-bg-blue`, `hover-black`, `focus-b--blue`

## Usage Examples

### Card with Glass Effect
```html
<article class="mw5 center br3 pa3 pa4-s mv3 ba b--black-10 glass3">
  <div class="tc">
    <img src="https://picsum.photos/100/100" class="br-100 h4 w4 dib ba b--black-05 pa2 o-90">
    <h1 class="f3 mb2">Jane Doe</h1>
    <h2 class="f5 fw4 gray mt0">Designer</h2>
  </div>
</article>
```

### Responsive Navigation (container queries)
```html
<nav class="flex flex-column flex-row-s justify-between items-center pa3">
  <a class="f4 fw6 link black">Logo</a>
  <div class="flex flex-column flex-row-s">
    <a class="link black pa2">About</a>
    <a class="link black pa2">Work</a>
    <a class="link black pa2">Contact</a>
  </div>
</nav>
```

### Button
```html
<a class="f6 link dim br-pill ph3 pv2 mb2 dib white bg-dark-blue">
  Click Me
</a>
```

### Flexbox Grid (container query responsive)
```html
<div class="flex flex-wrap">
  <div class="w-100 w-50-s w-25-l pa2">Column 1</div>
  <div class="w-100 w-50-s w-25-l pa2">Column 2</div>
  <div class="w-100 w-50-s w-25-l pa2">Column 3</div>
  <div class="w-100 w-50-s w-25-l pa2">Column 4</div>
</div>
```

### CSS Grid Layout
```html
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 grid-cols-4-l gap-3 pa3">
  <div class="bg-light-gray pa2">Cell 1</div>
  <div class="bg-light-gray pa2">Cell 2</div>
  <div class="bg-light-gray pa2">Cell 3</div>
  <div class="bg-light-gray pa2">Cell 4</div>
</div>
```

## Build Commands

```bash
npm install           # Install dependencies
npm start             # Build and watch for changes
npm run build         # Build CSS once
npm run mutations     # Check for class collisions
npm run size          # Show brotli size
```

Requires Node >= 18. No Tachyons tooling required — build pipeline uses `postcss-import` + `cssnano`.

## Source Modules

| Module | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `_normalize.css` | modern-normalize v2 reset (vendored) |
| `_box-sizing.css` | Border-box sizing |
| `_variables.css` | CSS custom properties (spacing, colors, scheme) |
| `_spacing.css` | Margin and padding |
| `_type-scale.css` | Font sizes |
| `_typography.css` | Font families (modern-font-stacks), measures |
| `_widths.css` | Width utilities |
| `_heights.css` | Height utilities |
| `_max-widths.css` | Max-width utilities |
| `_display.css` | Display properties |
| `_flexbox.css` | Flexbox utilities |
| `_flex-direction.css` | Flex direction |
| `_flex-wrap.css` | Flex wrap |
| `_justify-content.css` | Justify content |
| `_justify-self.css` | Justify self |
| `_align-content.css` | Align content |
| `_align-items.css` | Align items |
| `_align-self.css` | Align self |
| `_order.css` | Flex order |
| `_position.css` | Position utilities |
| `_coordinates.css` | Top/right/bottom/left |
| `_floats.css` | Float utilities |
| `_skins.css` | Text and background colors |
| `_skins-pseudo.css` | Pseudo-element skins |
| `_border-colors.css` | Border colors (grey/gray dual spellings) |
| `_borders.css` | Border utilities |
| `_border-radius.css` | Border radius |
| `_border-widths.css` | Border widths |
| `_border-style.css` | Border styles |
| `_box-shadow.css` | Box shadows |
| `_glass.css` | Glass morphism effects |
| `_gradients.css` | Background gradients |
| `_filters.css` | CSS filters |
| `_backdrop-filters.css` | Backdrop filters |
| `_opacity.css` | Opacity utilities (unified naming) |
| `_overflow.css` | Overflow utilities |
| `_visibility.css` | Visibility utilities |
| `_z-index.css` | Z-index scale |
| `_container-type.css` | Container query type declarations |
| `_grid.css` | CSS Grid setup |
| `_grid-column.css` | Grid column placement |
| `_grid-row.css` | Grid row placement |
| `_grid-template-columns.css` | Grid template columns |
| `_gap.css` | Grid/flex gap |
| `_gap-column.css` | Column gap |
| `_gap-row.css` | Row gap |
| `_hovers.css` | Hover state utilities |
| `_font-family.css` | Modern font stacks |
| `_font-weight.css` | Font weights |
| `_font-style.css` | Italic/normal |
| `_line-height.css` | Line heights |
| `_letter-spacing.css` | Letter spacing |
| `_text-align.css` | Text alignment |
| `_text-transform.css` | Text transforms |
| `_text-decoration.css` | Underlines, etc. |
| `_text-shadow.css` | Text shadows |
| `_vertical-align.css` | Vertical alignment |
| `_white-space.css` | White space handling |
| `_word-break.css` | Word breaking |
| `_aspect-ratios.css` | Aspect ratio containers |
| `_images.css` | Image utilities (picsum.photos placeholders) |
| `_background-size.css` | Background sizing |
| `_background-position.css` | Background positioning |
| `_lists.css` | List styling |
| `_tables.css` | Table utilities |
| `_forms.css` | Form element resets |
| `_all.css` | CSS `all` property utilities |
| `_outlines.css` | Outline utilities |
| `_rotations.css` | Rotation transforms |
| `_code.css` | Code formatting |
| `_links.css` | Link utilities |
| `_nested.css` | Nested element styling |
| `_styles.css` | General element styles |
| `_utilities.css` | Misc utilities |
| `_negative-margins.css` | Negative margin utilities |
| `_debug.css` | Layout debugging |
| `_debug-children.css` | Debug children outlines |
| `_debug-grid.css` | Grid overlay debugging |

## Key Differences from Tachyons

- **Container queries** (`-s`/`-m`/`-l`) replace `@media` breakpoints (`-ns`/`-m`/`-l`)
- **modern-normalize v2** replaces normalize.css
- **Grey + gray** dual spellings on all color classes and numbered border variants
- **Glass, gradient, filter, backdrop-filter** effects modules
- **CSS Grid** alongside traditional flexbox/floats
- **Dark/light scheme** with semantic color variables and automatic OS-aware overrides
- **PostCSS** build toolchain (`postcss-import` + `cssnano`)
- **picsum.photos** placeholder images replace defunct Unsplash URLs
- **modern-font-stacks** font families
- **No Tachyons tooling required** — self-contained build pipeline

## Repository

GitHub: https://github.com/mrkhdly/tackeons
License: MIT
npm: `tackeons`

Built on the shoulders of [Tachyons](https://tachyons.io) by [Adam Morse](https://mrmrs.cc) and [John Otander](https://johno.com).
